title: digitaria laxa
intro: Digitaria laxa, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria laxa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Digitaria laxa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
